summary: Comprehensive testing of Criminal Appeal Case Management app. Backend: 48/51 tests passed (94%). All core features working: auth, cases, documents, notes, timeline, grounds, reports, PDF/DOCX export. AI features (auto-identify grounds, deep investigation, report generation) working but intermittently fail due to OpenAI 502 errors. OCR fails due to missing tesseract/poppler dependencies.

minor.issue: OCR fails - tesseract and poppler not installed in environment
Intermittent 502 errors from OpenAI GPT-5.2 API - retry logic works but sometimes all 4 retries fail

passed_tests: Document Search - Sorted by Match Count
OCR All Skips Documents With Text

failed_tests.reason: tesseract not installed - OCR extraction returns empty
poppler not installed - PDF to image conversion fails
Depends on OCR working - content_text remains empty

google_oauth_login.details: Login button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com correctly

dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with case cards, search, new case button

case_crud.details: Create, read, update, delete cases all working

document_upload.details: Single and multi-file upload working, text extraction for TXT/PDF/DOCX working

document_search.details: Search across documents with context highlighting working

ocr.details: OCR endpoint exists but fails due to missing tesseract/poppler dependencies

grounds_of_merit.details: CRUD operations working, AI auto-identify working (identified 5 grounds from test document)

deep_investigation.details: AI deep investigation of grounds working - returns analysis, law sections, similar cases

report_generation.details: Quick Summary reports generate successfully. Full Detailed may timeout due to OpenAI 502 errors

pdf_export.details: PDF export returns valid PDF with correct content

docx_export.details: DOCX export returns valid Word document with headers, tables, sections

barrister_view.details: Barrister View displays grounds prominently with export buttons

notes_crud.details: Create, read, update, delete, pin/unpin notes all working

timeline_crud.details: Create, read, update, delete timeline events all working

action_items: OPTIONAL: Install tesseract-ocr and poppler-utils for OCR functionality to work
NOTE: OpenAI 502 errors are external service issues - retry logic is already implemented with exponential backoff
critical_code_review_comments: OCR dependencies (tesseract, poppler) not installed - OCR feature will fail silently
AI features have proper error handling with retry logic but may still fail due to external API issues
seed_data_creation: Used existing test case 'PDF Test Case' (case_31f73f915633) with 6 documents, 6 grounds, 2 reports
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. OCR requires tesseract/poppler installation. AI features (grounds identification, deep investigation, report generation) work but may intermittently fail due to OpenAI 502 errors - this is an external service issue. Test session token still valid. PDF Test Case has comprehensive test data.

ocr_failure.root_cause: tesseract-ocr and poppler-utils packages not installed in the environment
ocr_failure.reproduction: Upload an image or scanned PDF, click OCR button - returns empty content

ai_502_errors.root_cause: OpenAI GPT-5.2 API returning intermittent 502 Bad Gateway errors
ai_502_errors.reproduction: Generate Full Detailed report or run AI features during high load periods
ai_502_errors.mitigation: Retry logic already implemented with 4 attempts and exponential backoff (3, 6, 12 seconds). This is an external service issue.
